description: Expected behavior for self-healing demo across 3 models x 3 scenarios

healthy.notes: All models call the tool, get correct data, and produce a healthy response.

notes: Tool fails on first 2 calls, succeeds from 3rd onward.
Health check detects task_incomplete (tool_provided_data=false + uncertainty_acknowledged=true) and promotes to failed.
Feedback message injected as HumanMessage telling agent to retry the tool.
GPT: 1 retry to healthy. Claude: 1 retry to success (degraded due to alignment score). Gemini: 2 retries to healthy.
Tool returns identical Apple data for all 3 companies.
Health check detects low tool_result_diversity (0.33) and expansion_ratio.
No retry — this is a structural problem (broken API), not a transient error.
GPT: reports inability to get other companies' data. Claude: presents identical data with caveat. Gemini: correctly identifies the tool is returning wrong data.
